text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting tired of stepping on other people's
shadows.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The tide's about to change. ...I can win now. I
know it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... That's right. I'll pass all those shadows,
and...
